title: cleistanthus stipularis
intro: Cleistanthus stipularis is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. It is commonly known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cleistanthus stipularis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
